== Notes for [[Item:Q87467|Q87467]] ==

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quintus_Servilius_Caepio_(consul_106_BC)
'''
Gabrielsen, Paul'''. [https://attheu.utah.edu/facultystaff/caecilia-metella/ “Roman Noblewoman’s Tomb Reveals Secrets of Ancient Concrete Resilience.”] Utah.Edu, 8 Oct. 2021.

'''Syme, Ronald. ''Approaching the Roman Revolution: Papers on Republican History''. Edited by Federico Santangelo, Oxford University Press, 2016.''' [https://www.google.com/books/edition/Approaching_the_Roman_Revolution/uQOTDQAAQBAJ?hl=en&gbpv=1&dq=Caecilia+Metella&pg=PT118&printsec=frontcover eBook Preview]

'''Lightman, Marjorie, and Benjamin Lightman. ''A to Z of Ancient Greek and Roman Women.'' Facts On File, 2008. "Caecilia Metella (I)."''' [https://www.google.com/books/edition/A_to_Z_of_Ancient_Greek_and_Roman_Women/2esYJJUETiYC?hl=en&gbpv=1&dq=Caecilia+Metella&pg=PA62&printsec=frontcover Preview Book.]

'''Treggiari, Susan. ''Servilia and Her Family''. Oxford University Press, 2019.''' [https://www.google.com/books/edition/Servilia_and_her_Family/JR6DDwAAQBAJ?hl=en&gbpv=1&dq=Caecilia+Metella&pg=PA347&printsec=frontcover Preview Book]

'''Kinnee, Lauren. ''The Greek and Roman Trophy the Greek and Roman Trophy: From Battlefield Marker to Icon of Power'''''. Routledge, 2020. [https://www.google.com/books/edition/The_Greek_and_Roman_Trophy/skpnDwAAQBAJ?hl=en&gbpv=1&dq=Caecilia+Metella&pg=PT178&printsec=frontcover Preview Book]
'''
Schultz, Celia E., and Paul B. Harvey, editors. ''Yale Classical Studies: Religion in Republican Italy Series Number 33'''''. Cambridge University Press, 2006. [https://www.google.com/books/edition/The_Greek_and_Roman_Trophy/skpnDwAAQBAJ?hl=en&gbpv=1&dq=Caecilia+Metella&pg=PT178&printsec=frontcover Preview Book]

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
